value.address: 4631 Viewridge Ave Unit B, San Diego, CA 92123

evidence.snippet:
**NEUTRONICS ENTERPRISES LLC
4631 Viewridge Ave Unit B
San Diego, CA 92123**

Neumotors offers brushless motor engineering and manufacturing.  Our product line includes brushless motors and controllers from 50 watts to 50kW output. With hundreds of motors and thousands of configurations in our catalog, Neumotors can provide a great BLDC solution for your prototype or production needs.

OEM production solutions often require customized engineering and manufacturing – we welcome your requests! With many years of supplying top aerospace firms, we have the tools and experience in our San Diego, CA, offices to design custom BLDC drive solutions.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Designs and manufactures BLDC motors and distributes ESCs; all are components that go into drones and other aerospace platforms.

ndaa.notes: Site maintains dedicated 'NDAA 848' product tag with 18 tagged products (e.g. APD F-series ESCs). 'Not china' tag used alongside NDAA 848 tag on same products.

evidence.snippet: Neumotors offers brushless motor engineering and manufacturing.  Our product line includes brushless motors and controllers from 50 watts to 50kW output. With hundreds of motors and thousands of configurations in our catalog, Neumotors can provide a great BLDC solution for your prototype or production needs.

Neumotors brushless motors are assembled in California, Philippines and/or China from components sourced globally. We are happy to work with customers to meet their sourcing requirements. All motors are designed and individually tested in our ISO9001 certified San Diego facility.

readiness.notes: Hundreds of catalog motor SKUs with listed prices and 'Add to cart'; ISO 9001 certified facility; also offers custom engineering as a secondary mode.

unresolved_questions: Individual NeuMotors motor SKUs were on a dynamically-rendered table (resource-0002) that did not capture in text — motor model numbers not enumerated.
Blue UAS status not mentioned anywhere in corpus.

fetch_requests.reason: Motor catalog page likely lists individual NeuMotors motor SKUs and would confirm full product breadth for propulsion_mechanical category.

tagline: BLDC motors (50 W–50 kW, COTS and custom) and brushless motor controllers (APD and microDRIVE lines, 25V–UHV, all NDAA-compliant) designed and tested in San Diego. ISO 9001 certified. Public evidence limited on defense primes' adoption; Blue UAS status unknown.
